TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.SettingsGroup.tokensPan: Configure the scene tokens panel and what it displays.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.SettingsGroup.tokenLayo: Configure token overlay layout visuals and effects.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.SettingsGroup.controlPa: Configure the control panel visibility and interaction behavior.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.EnableOverlay.H: Toggles token overlay visuals. Other module features remain available.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokensPanelMini: Minimum Foundry role required to see the tokens panel.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokenLayoutMini: Minimum Foundry role required to see token layout overlays.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.ControlPanelMin: Minimum Foundry role required to see the control panel.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokensPanelEnab: Enable Status Row
Toggles the status row on tokens panel cards.
Show Statuses
Displays status chips on tokens panel cards.
Show Wounds
Displays wound chips on tokens panel cards.
Show Temporary Effects
Displays temporary-effect chips on tokens panel cards.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokensPanelShow: Applies dead-state styling to tokens panel cards.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokensPanelPosi: Choose how the panel position behaves.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokensPanelDrag: Choose where the top panel drag button appears.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokensPanelCard: Minimum Foundry role required to reorder tokens panel cards.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokensPanelEnab: Enable Tooltips
Enables top panel tooltips for cards, chips, and controls.
Enable Cards Tooltip
Shows tooltip details when hovering top panel cards.
Enable Statuses Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on status icons.
Enable Wounds Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on wounds icons.
Enable Temporary Effects Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on temporary effects icons.
Enable Overflow Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on overflow indicators.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokenLayoutShow: Displays custom overlay borders on hovered or controlled tokens.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokenLayoutEnab: Toggles the status row in the token layout overlay.
Displays status chips in the token layout overlay.
Displays wound chips in the token layout overlay.
Displays temporary-effect chips in the token layout overlay.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokenLayoutShow: Displays the module custom name label in the token layout overlay.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokenLayoutName: Choose where the custom name label appears.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokenLayoutShow: Applies grayscale dead-state styling to tokens with the dead condition.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.TokenLayoutEnab: Shows tooltip details when hovering token layout names.
Shows tooltip details on status icons in token layout.
Shows tooltip details on wounds icons in token layout.
Shows tooltip details on temporary effects icons in token layout.
Shows tooltip details on overflow indicators in token layout.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.ControlPanelEna: Enable Status Row
Toggles the status row in the control panel.
Show Statuses
Displays status icons in the control panel status row.
Show Abilities
Displays ability chips in the control panel status row.
Show Wounds
Displays wound chips in the control panel status row.
Show Temporary Effects
Displays temporary-effect chips in the control panel status row.
Enable Portrait
Toggles the portrait section in the control panel.
Show Name
Displays the selected token name on the control panel portrait.
Show Stats
Displays the full stats block (wounds, resilience, speed, miscast dice) on the control panel portrait.
Show Image
Displays the selected token portrait image in the control panel.
Enable Grid Buttons
Toggles the control panel grid buttons area.
Show Action Buttons
Enables manoeuvre, recover, and general action buttons in the control panel grid (excluding magic buttons).
Show Weapon Buttons
Enables weapon buttons in the control panel grid.
Show Magic Buttons
Enables magic-related buttons in the control panel grid, including special magic and miscast actions.
Show Items Rarity
Shows rarity-based visual accents on control panel item slots.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.ControlPanelSho: Applies dead-state styling to portraits of selected tokens with the dead condition.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.ControlPanelPos: Choose how the panel position behaves.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.ControlPanelEna: Enable Buttons Drag and Drop
Allow drag-and-drop reordering for control panel action buttons.
Enable Tooltips
Enables control panel tooltips for names, stats, chips, and buttons.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.ControlPanelSho: Shows click and modifier interaction guidance in control panel tooltips.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Setting.ControlPanelEna: Enable Name Tooltip
Shows tooltip details when hovering the selected token name.
Enable Stats Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on portrait stats.
Enable Statuses Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on status chips.
Enable Abilities Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on abilities chips.
Enable Wounds Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on wounds chips.
Enable Temporary Effects Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on temporary effects chips.
Enable Buttons Tooltip
Shows tooltip details on control panel action buttons.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.NoPermissi: You do not have permission to edit {actorName}.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.OverlayDis: Combat overlay visuals disabled. Other module features remain available.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.ModuleApiU: The Old World Combat Overlay API is unavailable.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.OldWorldTe: Cannot roll a characteristic test: OldWorldTest is unavailable.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.NoSpellLor: Cannot accumulate power: no spell lore is available for this actor.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.ApiUnavail: Cannot run an ability test: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
Cannot run a weapon test: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
Cannot run a skill test: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
Cannot add a condition: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
Cannot remove a condition: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
Cannot apply damage: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
Cannot add a wound: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
Cannot prompt a staggered choice: the system API is unavailable for this actor.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.Defence.No: {actorName}: characteristic '{characteristic}' does not have a valid value.
{actorName}: no rollable skills or characteristics were found.
{actorName}: no rollable skills were found for the default defence roll.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Notification.Defence.Fa: {actorName}: '{defaultSkill}' was not found, so '{rolledSkill}' was rolled instead.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Wounds.Title: Wounds
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Wounds.Descript: Left click: +1 wound · Right click: -1 wound.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Attack.Title: Attack
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Attack.Descript: Attack roll. Left click: attack · Drag: quick target selection · Shift+click: manual mode.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Defence.Title: Defence
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Defence.Descrip: Defence roll. Left click: defend · Shift+click: manual mode.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.RollModifier.De: Left click: +1 bonus die · Right click: +1 penalty die · Shift+click: cycle Common, Glorious, and Grim.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Resilience.Desc: Resilience value used for durability and damage resolution thresholds.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.ActorType.Stand: Standard NPC type without wound thresholds.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.ActorType.Champ: Champions do not use wound thresholds and track wounds normally.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Panel.DiceModif:
Left click: +1d10 · Right click: -1d10 · Ctrl+click: reset to +0d10

Current: {value}
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Panel.RollState:
Left click: next state · Right click: previous state · Ctrl+click: set Common

Current: {stateLabel}
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.TopPanel.DragHa: Drag and drop to move the top panel.
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Panel.Wounds.In: Left click: +1 wound · Right click: -1 wound · Shift+click: roll on wounds · Ctrl+click: reset to 0
TOWCOMBATOVERLAY.Tooltip.Panel.MiscastDi: Left click: +1 die · Right click: -1 die · Shift+click: roll miscast table · Ctrl+click: reset to 0
Left click: pick target then auto-roll unarmed attack (Brawn vs Endurance) · Shift+click: self auto-roll · Alt+click: pick target then open default attack dialog · Alt+Shift+click: open default self-roll dialog

Left click: pick target then auto-roll attack · Shift+click: auto-roll self attack · Alt+click: pick target then open default Foundry attack dialog (no auto-roll) · Alt+Shift+click: open default Foundry self-roll dialog (no auto-roll) · Ctrl+click: instantly reload this weapon (ranged weapons with reload flow only)
Reload progress: {current} / {target} successes.
Extra properties
Left click: auto-flow action (auto-roll and auto-pick first) · Alt+click: default Foundry action dialogs
Left click: pick target then auto-roll · Shift+click: self auto-roll · Alt+click: pick target then manual dialog · Alt+Shift+click: self manual dialog
Left click: pick target then auto-flow · Shift+click: self auto-flow · Alt+click: pick target then manual dialogs · Alt+Shift+click: self manual dialogs
Left click: auto-pick first skill and auto-roll · Alt+click: manual skill selection and dialogs
Left click: auto defence · Alt+click: manual defence selection dialog
Left click: roll on the miscast table · Ctrl+click: reset accumulated and potency values to 0
Left click: auto-roll casting test with current roll modifiers to accumulate power · Alt+click: open default manual casting dialog · Ctrl+click: reset accumulated and potency values to 0
Left click: run selected Recover action with auto flow · Alt+click: open manual dialogs for the selected Recover action
Left click: run Recover with auto flow
Left click: auto-roll manoeuvre checks (no dialogs) · Alt+click: default Foundry manoeuvre flow (with dialogs)
Right click: remove temporary effect.
Left click: show details.

Left click: cast and auto-process Apply buttons (with target pick when needed) · Shift+click: same cast flow, but using only currently selected targets (no target pick mode, no self fallback) · Alt+click: pick target then cast manually (no auto-apply)
